pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and recipe requirements.
Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or enforce Java 21 compatibility as intended by the migration.
